full_text:
Approximately 1 cm tissue piece was minced and dissociated in 15 ml of AdF++ medium containing 300 ul of 50U/ml dispase and 150ul of RNAse free DNAse, according to the protocol.

Final cell pellet was resuspended in 1 ml of AdF++ medium

Cell count 1):

total: 3.18 E6

live: 1.83 E6

viability: 57.5 %

Size: 8.4 um

Cell count 2):

total: 2.51 E6

live: 1.45 E6

viability: 58.0 %

Size: 8.7 um

Cell count: 2.85 E6 / mL

Total volume: 2 mL

Total cell count: 5.70 E6

Practice culturing

60 wells

60 wells x 40 µl x = 2400 µl → round up to 2700 uL (=1350ul x2)

1000 cells/µl = 1.35 E6 * 2 tubes

→ make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1350 µl

volume to take from cell suspension:

ORG full medium → 529µl

Cells - 245.5 µl

ome-gel → 190 µl

aprotinin → 4.5 µl

thrombin → 4 µl

fibrinogen → 27 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 125 uL medium

Day 0 flow cytometry

As it was an ovary sample that I was practicing with, I used the remaining cells for practicing flow cytometry

The plates were discarded as both Ashwini and Abhilash tried plating with multichannel pipettes and the results were not optimal.

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
